title: Finnish-Inspired Values, Equity and Trust
purpose: Build shared understanding of equity, dignity, trust, wellbeing, access and ethical Finnish-inspired positioning.
audience: Teachers, school leaders, learning-centre owners, facilitators, ECE practitioners, and parent educators
delivery_mode: Blended: self-paced video + live workshop + classroom implementation + evidence portfolio
certificate_wording: FCEI Certificate of Completion / CPD Training Certificate - Finnish-inspired professional development. Not an official Finnish national qualification unless a formal awarding partnership is obtained.
